title: Villager Coin
description: Swap emeralds for any item in villager trades.  Plugin with no client install required. Works in single-player too.
body:
# Villager Coin

Set any item as the currency for Villager trading.
Defaults to **Emeralds** (Vanilla behavior).
Want villagers to trade **Gold Ingots**? **Diamonds**? **Cookies**? You can do that.

## How to change currency
You can change the currency in-game or via config.

**In-Game:**
Run the command:
`/villagercoin set <item_id>`
Example: `/villagercoin set minecraft:diamond`

**Config File:**
Edit `config/villager_coin.json` and change `currencyItem`.

## Commands
- `/villagercoin set <item>` - Sets the currency.
- `/villagercoin reload` - Reloads the config (updates villagers instantly).
- `/villagercoin info` - Checks current currency.

### Installation

Works as a server-sided plugin or a single-player mod.
